meta.purpose: Capability stages, practice loops, and measurable indicators.
meta.load_condition: Load for learning, team standards, audits, or progressive quality improvement.

stages.name: Symptom spotting
indicators: can identify obvious jank, missing reduced-motion, and clearly broken animations
uses taste words to describe problems
reviews one animation at a time

stages.name: Structural diagnosis
indicators: every critique traces to a specific structural cause
can diagnose density, attention conflict, easing mismatch, and missing holds

stages.name: Review rubric mastery
indicators: team uses shared review vocabulary and diagnostic checklists
quality metrics tracked over time (time-to-approval, revision cycles)
review process integrated into design and engineering workflows

evolution_layers.name: Symptom spotting → Structural diagnosis
evolution_layers.capability: Progress from Symptom spotting to Structural diagnosis

evolution_layers.name: Structural diagnosis → Review rubric mastery
evolution_layers.capability: Progress from Structural diagnosis to Review rubric mastery

measurement.how: Track simultaneous_motion_groups_at_peak over iterations of the practice loop.
Track hold_duration_after_primary_beats_ms over iterations of the practice loop.
Track easing_character_consistency_score over iterations of the practice loop.
Track review_cycles_to_approval over iterations of the practice loop.
Track critique_structure_score over iterations of the practice loop.
Track diagnostic_coverage_of_quality_labels over iterations of the practice loop.
